title: gutierrezia wrightii
intro: Gutierrezia wrightii, also known as Wright's snakeweed or Wright's broom snakeweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gutierrezia wrightii are said to include the reduction of pain and inflammation, and it may also help to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
